name: Super Quantum Green Layer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>量</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グリーンレイヤー
desc: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Super Quant" monster from your hand. If this card is sent to the Graveyard: You can discard 1 "Super Quant" card; draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Super Quantum Green Layer" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Super Quant" monster from your hand. If this card is sent to the Graveyard: You can discard 1 "Super Quant" card; draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Super Quantum Green Layer" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Super Quant" monster from your hand. If this card is sent to the Graveyard: You can discard 1 "Super Quant" card; draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Super Quantum Green Layer" once per turn.
